name: deepresearch
description: /deepresearch - Multi-query semantic research using Exa neural search. Claude generates diverse queries, Exa returns top-K results with full page contents in one call, Claude synthesizes a structured research.md. Requires an Exa API key (free tier covers most usage).

configPrompts.prompt: /deepresearch requires an Exa API key. Sign up at https://exa.ai (free tier: 1000 searches/mo; Pro tier ~$10/mo for 10k). After signup, add `export EXA_API_KEY=...` to your shell rc (e.g. ~/.zshrc) and reload. The skill checks for this at runtime and fails with instructions if unset.
